entries.statement: Skill in formulating business problems as machine learning problems, including defining the prediction target, identifying appropriate inputs, and establishing measurable success criteria.
Skill in conducting exploratory data analysis, including distributional analysis, correlation analysis, anomaly detection, and translating EDA findings into modeling decisions.
Skill in writing production-quality Python code for data processing, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation, including documentation and unit testing.
Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business stakeholders in terms of business impact rather than technical metrics.
Skill in refactoring research-quality data science code into production-grade, tested, documented, and deployable ML systems.
Skill in designing and implementing model serving APIs, including input validation, output formatting, error handling, authentication, and versioning.
Skill in implementing automated ML retraining pipelines triggered by performance degradation signals or data distribution shifts.
Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought prompting, and structured output generation.
Skill in building and evaluating RAG pipelines, including embedding model selection, retrieval quality measurement, and end-to-end system evaluation.
Skill in implementing AI application guardrails, including input validation, output filtering, safety classifiers, and human-in-the-loop intervention points.
Skill in fine-tuning pre-trained language models for domain-specific tasks, including dataset preparation, training configuration, and evaluation design.
Skill in designing and implementing NLP evaluation pipelines that measure task-specific performance, robustness, and fairness.
Skill in preparing image and video datasets for model training, including annotation pipeline design, quality control, augmentation strategy, and train/validation split construction.
Skill in training, evaluating, and optimizing computer vision models, including performance profiling, inference optimization, and edge deployment considerations.
Skill in designing feature engineering pipelines that produce consistent, reproducible, low-latency features for both batch and real-time model serving.

Skill in designing and implementing CI/CD pipelines for ML models, including automated testing at unit, integration, and model quality levels, artifact versioning, and deployment automation with rollback capability.

Skill in diagnosing and resolving ML infrastructure failures, including training job crashes, serving latency spikes, resource contention across shared clusters, and data pipeline breakdowns that affect model inputs.
Skill in evaluating AI use case feasibility, including data availability assessment, technical complexity estimation, and business value quantification.
Skill in building and presenting AI proof-of-concept demonstrations to executive audiences, communicating capability, limitations, and path to production.
